queryParameters.q: SELECT CreatedDate, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, LoginKey, Operation, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, QueriedEntities, RequestIdentifier, RowsProcessed, Score, SecurityEventData, SessionKey, SourceIp, Summary, Uri, UserAgent, UserId, Username FROM ApiAnomalyEventStore WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT ActionName, AdditionalInfo, ApiType, ApiVersion, Application, BotSessionIdentifier, Client, ConnectedAppId, CreatedDate, ElapsedTime, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, LoginHistoryId, LoginKey, Operation, OperationStatus, PlannerId, Platform, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, QueriedEntities, Query, Records, RelatedEventIdentifier, RequestIdentifier, RowsProcessed, RowsReturned, SessionKey, SessionLevel, SourceIp, UserAgent, UserId, Username FROM ApiEvent WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT CreatedDate, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, LoginHistoryId, LoginKey, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, Query, RelatedEventIdentifier, SessionKey, SessionLevel, SourceIp, UserId, Username FROM BulkApiResultEventStore WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT AcceptLanguage, CreatedDate, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, LoginKey, LoginType, LoginUrl, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, Score, SessionKey, SourceIp, Summary, UserAgent, UserId, Username FROM CredentialStuffingEventStore WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT CanDownloadPdf, ContentSize, CreatedById, CreatedDate, DocumentId, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, FileAction, FileName, FileSource, FileType, IsLatestVersion, LoginKey, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, ProcessDuration, RelatedEventIdentifier, SessionKey, SessionLevel, SourceIp, UserId, Username, VersionId, VersionNumber FROM FileEventStore WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT CreatedDate, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, LoginKey, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, RequestedEntities, Score, SecurityEventData, SessionKey, SoqlCommands, SourceIp, Summary, TotalControllerEvents, UserAgent, UserId, UserType, Username FROM GuestUserAnomalyEventStore WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT Activity, City, Country, CountryIso, CreatedDate, EventDate, EventGroup, EventIdentifier, Id, Latitude, LoginHistoryId, LoginKey, Longitude, Policy, PostalCode, Remarks, ResourceId, SessionKey, SessionLevel, SourceIp, Status, Subdivision, UserId, Username, VerificationMethod FROM IdentityVerificationEvent WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT AppId, AuthSessionId, CreatedDate, ErrorCode, EventDate, EventIdentifier, HasLogoutUrl, Id, IdentityUsed, InitiatedBy, SamlEntityUrl, SsoType, UserId FROM IdentityProviderEventStore WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT AppName, ConnectionType, CreatedDate, DeviceId, DeviceModel, DevicePlatform, DeviceSessionId, Duration, EffectivePageTime, EffectivePageTimeDeviationErrorType, EffectivePageTimeDeviationReason, EventDate, EventIdentifier, HasEffectivePageTimeDeviation, LoginKey, Operation, OsName, OsVersion, PageStartTime, PageUrl, PreviousPageAppName, PreviousPageEntityId, PreviousPageEntityType, PreviousPageUrl, QueriedEntities, RecordId, RelatedEventIdentifier, SdkAppType, SdkAppVersion, SdkVersion, SessionKey, SessionLevel, SourceIp, UserAgent, UserId, UserType, Username FROM LightningUriEvent WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT AppName, ColumnHeaders, CreatedDate, DeveloperName, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, EventSource, ExecutionIdentifier, FilterCriteria, ListViewId, LoginHistoryId, LoginKey, Name, NumberOfColumns, OrderBy, OwnerId, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, QueriedEntities, Records, RelatedEventIdentifier, RowsProcessed, Scope, Sequence, SessionKey, SessionLevel, SourceIp, UserId, Username FROM ListViewEvent WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT CreatedDate, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, FeatureContribution, FeatureName, FeatureValue, LoginKey, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, Score, SecurityEventData, SessionKey, SourceIp, Summary, UserId, Username FROM LoginAnomalyEventStore WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT Application, Browser, CreatedDate, DelegatedOrganizationId, DelegatedUsername, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, LoginAccessChangeExpDate, LoginAccessChangeGranteeName, LoginAccessChangeGranteeType, LoginAsCategory, LoginHistoryId, LoginKey, LoginType, Platform, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, SessionKey, SessionLevel, SourceIp, TargetUrl, UserId, UserType, Username FROM LoginAsEvent WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT AdditionalInfo, ApiType, ApiVersion, Application, AuthMethodReference, AuthServiceId, Browser, CipherSuite, City, ClientVersion, Country, CountryIso, CreatedDate, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, ForwardedForIp, HttpMethod, LoginGeoId, LoginHistoryId, LoginKey, LoginLatitude, LoginLongitude, LoginSubType, LoginType, LoginUrl, Platform, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, PostalCode, RelatedEventIdentifier, SessionKey, SessionLevel, SourceIp, Status, Subdivision, TlsProtocol, UserId, UserType, Username FROM LoginEvent WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT CreatedDate, EventDate, EventIdentifier, LoginKey, SessionKey, SessionLevel, SourceIp, UserId, Username FROM LogoutEvent WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT CreatedDate, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, EventSource, HasExternalUsers, ImpactedUserIds, LoginHistoryId, LoginKey, Operation, ParentIdList, ParentNameList, PermissionExpiration, PermissionExpirationList, PermissionList, PermissionType, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, RelatedEventIdentifier, SessionKey, SessionLevel, SourceIp, UserCount, UserId, Username FROM PermissionSetEventStore WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT CreatedDate, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, LoginKey, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, Report, Score, SecurityEventData, SessionKey, SourceIp, Summary, UserId, Username FROM ReportAnomalyEventStore WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT ActionName, BotSessionIdentifier, ColumnHeaders, CreatedDate, DashboardId, DashboardName, Description, DisplayedFieldEntities, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, EventSource, ExecutionIdentifier, ExportFileFormat, Format, GroupedColumnHeaders, IsScheduled, LoginHistoryId, LoginKey, Name, NumberOfColumns, Operation, OwnerId, PlannerId, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, QueriedEntities, Records, RelatedEventIdentifier, ReportId, RowsProcessed, Scope, Sequence, SessionKey, SessionLevel, SourceIp, UserId, Username FROM ReportEvent WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT CreatedDate, CurrentIp, CurrentPlatform, CurrentScreen, CurrentUserAgent, CurrentWindow, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, LoginKey, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, PreviousIp, PreviousPlatform, PreviousScreen, PreviousUserAgent, PreviousWindow, Score, SecurityEventData, SessionKey, SourceIp, Summary, UserId, Username FROM SessionHijackingEventStore WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT AnomalySubType, CreatedDate, EvaluationTime, EventDate, EventIdentifier, LoginKey, PolicyId, PolicyOutcome, Score, SecurityEventData, SessionKey, SourceIp, Summary, UserId, Username FROM UniversalAnomalyEventStore WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}

SELECT CreatedDate, EventDate, EventIdentifier, LoginKey, Message, Name, Operation, OperationStatus, QueriedEntities, RecordId, RelatedEventIdentifier, SessionKey, SessionLevel, SourceIp, UserId, UserType, Username FROM UriEvent WHERE EventDate > {_QueryWindowStartTime} AND EventDate < {_QueryWindowEndTime}
